reasoning: Initial observation, need to determine the relationship between A, B, C and Y.
Increasing A did not change Y, so A is not directly involved in the equation. Next, I will increase B to see if it affects Y.

Increasing B from 20.0 to 30.0 increased Y from 70.0 to 80.0, suggesting B might be directly related to Y. Since increasing A did not affect Y, A is not part of the equation. Decreasing B would help confirm the relationship.
Decreasing B back to its original value confirms that B is directly related to Y. Now, I will increase C to see if it affects Y.
Increasing C from 30.0 to 40.0 increased Y from 70.0 to 80.0, indicating C is also directly related to Y. Given the pattern, Y seems to be the sum of A, B, and C.
